eventMetadata.context_description: Mexico enter the 2026 FIFA World Cup opener as clear favorites against South Africa at Estadio Azteca, bolstered by an unbeaten run across eight 2026 friendlies that includes a 5-1 victory over Serbia and clean-sheet wins versus Ghana and Australia.
